SDET / QA Automation Engineer — 5 years

Test Automation:
• Selenium, Playwright, Cypress — E2E browser automation, cross-browser compatibility testing
• pytest, unittest — Python unit and integration test suites, fixture management, parameterization
• API testing — Postman, requests, contract testing with Pact

Performance & Load:
• JMeter, k6 — load testing, stress testing, performance regression baselines
• CI/CD integration — automated performance gates in Jenkins and GitHub Actions pipelines

Quality Engineering:
• BDD — Gherkin feature files, Cucumber step definitions, living documentation
• Accessibility testing — WCAG 2.1 AA compliance audits using axe-core and manual screen reader testing
• Static analysis — SonarQube, coverage reporting, defect tracking in Jira
• Agile scrum — test planning, test case authoring, regression suite triage
